standard: NIST CSF 2.0 (Feb 2024) x NIST SP 800-53 Rev 5
doctrine: COVERED only on live evidence observed right now; a documented real gap is PARTIAL; anything unassessable is UNVERIFIED. Never COVERED on a claim alone.

GOVERN.mechanism: Founder decision chain-of-custody + HELM_SOURCE_HOLDER identity binding + monotonic fencing tokens
GOVERN.evidence: decision_ledger hash-chain intact (6 decisions) AND 11 paths under monotonic fencing tokens, 26 history entries
GOVERN.detail: founder_gate: chain intact (6 decisions). Identity comes from HELM_SOURCE_HOLDER (env, falls back to git user.name / $USER) bound to a monotonic fencing token per file -- a resurrected/stale writer cannot forge a later write.

GOVERN.mechanism: Tool/model provenance attestation, fail-closed on unattested dispatch
GOVERN.evidence: attested tool fails live verification: GROK_CLI

IDENTIFY.mechanism: Static verifiers run against the codebase (egress, runtime-truth, tautology)

PROTECT.mechanism: AU-9 tamper-evident evidence chain (sha256 hash-chained ledger)
PROTECT.control_title: Protection of Audit Information | Cryptographic Protection
PROTECT.detail: entry_hash = sha256(canonical(body) + prev_hash); edit/delete/reorder breaks the chain at that point and every record after it

PROTECT.mechanism: guarded_edit lease-before-write + .githooks pre-commit conflict detector + test suite + commit-bound evidence (secure SDLC / SSDF 800-218)
PROTECT.control_title: Configuration Change Control | Developer Configuration Management
PROTECT.evidence: guarded_edit + pre-commit conflict detector + test suite all present, hook active
PROTECT.detail: checks={'guarded_edit_facade': True, 'pre_commit_hook': True, 'conflict_detector': True, 'test_suite_nontrivial': True}, 184 test_*.py modules, core.hooksPath=configured

PROTECT.mechanism: Founder token gate on writes (fail-closed, constant-time, PROPOSE_ONLY/FOUNDER_ONLY verb separation)
PROTECT.csf_category: PR.AA — Identity Mgmt, Authn and Access Control
PROTECT.control_title: Access Enforcement | Identification and Authentication (write path)
PROTECT.evidence: founder_gate.authorized(): fail-closed (no token => no approvals), hmac.compare_digest, PROPOSE_ONLY/FOUNDER_ONLY verb separation (a FOUNDER_ONLY act cannot be executed by a tap)
PROTECT.detail: static verification of backend/council/founder_gate.py; live check via /api/v1/helm/authority (decision chain + pending escalations)

PROTECT.mechanism: Read-side (GET) authentication on the live API
PROTECT.csf_category: PR.AA — Identity Mgmt, Authn and Access Control
PROTECT.control_title: Access Enforcement | Identification and Authentication (read path)
PROTECT.evidence: read-auth layer staged on disk (__init__.py, bind_audit.py, config.py, dev_cert.py, read_auth.py, staged_server.py) but NOT mounted in helm_live_api.py -- read (GET) endpoints are currently unauthenticated
PROTECT.detail: SWARM-2 deliverable, deliberately not hot-applied without founder approval (bind/TLS/read-auth changes can break phone access over Tailscale and the live Phase-C soak if flipped carelessly)

PROTECT.mechanism: AST-verified single egress chokepoint for all model dispatch
PROTECT.detail: static scan proves no provider call bypasses the gateway

DETECT.evidence: authoritative package HELM-SOAK-24H-20260715T113622Z selected but evidence is STALE (2052.342360496521s old)
DETECT.detail: 3 phase(s) sealed PASS historically; current liveness cannot be confirmed from fresh daemon writes

DETECT.mechanism: Continuous monitoring surface with UNKNOWN guards, zero numeric fallbacks
DETECT.evidence: 3 numeric fallbacks present in the monitoring surface
DETECT.detail: a dashboard that substitutes a default for a missing fact is fabricating

RESPOND.detail: blocks bind to capability, not the whole lane (least privilege)

RECOVER.mechanism: SIGKILL restart recovery with monotonic fencing (proven, not structural-only)
RECOVER.detail: monotonic fencing token prevents a resurrected worker from writing
